title: EventEnvelope
description: Durable per-run event. The (run_id, sequence) pair is the storage uniqueness key and event_id is globally unique.
$comment: Storage MUST enforce UNIQUE(run_id, sequence) and global uniqueness of event_id for idempotent replay. Core §22.3 event semantics are agent_started, task_completed, artifact_published, score_changed, discussion_opened, validation_confirmed, agent_restarted, and decision_published; R2.13 requires role.phase.event naming.
